meta.release_notes:
# Changelog
All notable changes to this model will be documented in this file.

## [2.0.0] - 2023-12-04
### Added
- added all relevant part site information of the PartSiteInforamtionAsPlanned aspect model, that will be deprecated

### Changed
- replaced existing BPNCharacteristic with the BPNCharacterstic of the shared BusinessPartnerNumber aspect model

### Removed
- removed the whole validityPeriod abstract property with its respective child properties and characteristics

## [1.0.1]
### Added
n/a

### Changed
- PartAsPlanned aspect element and manufacturerPartID property elements have improved descriptions , more explicitly mentioning versioning information of a part as planned
- all characteristics, entities, and constraints now have proper names, preferred names and descriptions
- validFrom and validTo properties now have more meaningful example values.
- fixed some typos in preferred names and descriptions.

### Removed
n/a

## [1.0.0] - 2022-08-06
### Added
- initial model

### Changed
n/a

### Removed

nodes.label: PartAsPlanned
nodes.description: A Part as Planned represents an item in the Catena-X Bill of Material(BOM) in As-Planned lifecycle status in a specific version.

nodes.label: catenaXId
nodes.description: The fully anonymous Catena-X ID of the serialized part, valid for the Catena-X dataspace.

nodes.label: partTypeInformation
nodes.description: The part type from which the serialized part has been instantiated

nodes.label: partSitesInformationAsPlanned
nodes.description: A site is a delimited geographical area where a legal entity does business(geographical address with geo coordinates).A site always has a primary physical address. It is possible that further physical addresses are specified for the site. P.O. box details are only possible in addition to the physical address. A site has a 1:n relation to addresses, means at least 1 address is necessary and multiple addresses are possible.

nodes.label: manufacturerPartId
nodes.description:
Part ID as assigned by the manufacturer of the part. The Part ID identifies the part in the manufacturer`s dataspace. The Part ID references a specific version of a part. The version number must be included in the Part ID if it is available.

The Part ID does not reference a specific instance of a part and must not be confused with the serial number.

nodes.label: nameAtManufacturer
nodes.description: Name of the part as assigned by the manufacturer

nodes.label: classification
nodes.description: The classification of the part type according to STEP standard definition

nodes.label: catenaXsiteId
nodes.description: The identifier of the site according to Catena-X BPDM. The catenaXsiteId must be a valid Catena-X BPN. The BPN is a unique, unchangeable identifier for Business Partners / company locations from foundation to closure, regardless of the different business relationships / structures between or within the Business Partners or company locations.

nodes.label: function
nodes.description: The function of the site in relation to the part(i.e. the activity within the value chain of the part that is performed at the site)

nodes.label: functionValidFrom
nodes.description: Timestamp, from when the site has the specified function for the given part

nodes.label: functionValidUntil
nodes.description: Timestamp, until when the site has the specified function for the given part

nodes.label: PartTypeInformationCharacteristic
nodes.description: The characteristics of the part type

nodes.label: PartIdCharacteristic
nodes.description: The part ID is a multi-character string, usually assigned by an ERP system

nodes.label: PartNameCharacteristic
nodes.description: Part Name in string format from the respective system in the value chain

nodes.label: partSitesInformationAsPlannedCharacteristic
nodes.preferredName: Part Sites Information as Planned Characteristic
nodes.description: The characteristic of the part site information that represents a set of possible site to a repective part.

nodes.label: PartTypeInformationEntity
nodes.description: Encapsulation for data related to the part type

nodes.label: partSitesInformationAsPlannedEntity
nodes.preferredName: Part Sites Information as Planned Entity
nodes.description: Describes the ID, function and validity date of a site for the associated part in the AsPlanned context.

nodes.label: ClassificationEnumerationCharacteristic
nodes.description: A part type must be placed into one of the following classes: 'component', 'product', 'software', ?assembly?, 'tool', or 'raw material'.

nodes.label: FunctionCharacteristic
nodes.description: Describes the characteristics of the function for a site related to the respective part
